slug.description: Stable identifier used to reference this character from encounters, quests, dialogues, and profiles.

name.description: Primary display name for this character.

title.description: Optional epithet, job title, or honorific shown alongside the character name.

description.description: Short biography, role notes, or authoring context for this character.

image_path.description: Portrait or character image asset path.

level.description: Approximate gameplay level used for balance, rewards, and simulations.

class_id.description: Combat class that defines this character's baseline role and progression.

faction_id.description: Faction this character belongs to or primarily represents.

home_location_id.description: Location most closely associated with this character.

tags.description: Freeform labels for filtering, grouping, and content rules.
